title: The Unsolved Case of Eric Tamiyasu

scenes.text: A murder case from 2001 is being reviewed again, raising hope for justice.
Eric Tamiyasu's murder case is being re-examined in Burbank, California.
His death was a major case, but leads have faded over time.
Authorities now hope modern techniques can uncover new evidence.
scenes.label: HOPE FOR JUSTICE
scenes.sub: With new hope, the past may speak.

scenes.text: Follow for the cases no one can explain.

description: 📍 Burbank, California - 2001. The unsolved murder of Eric Tamiyasu is being reopened, offering new hope for answers after many years. Follow for daily mysteries!
